mapper.sql: user_id, hotel_id, username, password, role, phone, status, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE status = #{status} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE role = #{role} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (hotel_id, username, password, role, phone, status, is_delete, create_time) VALUES (#{hotelId}, #{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{isDelete}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET username = #{username}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET role = #{role}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET phone = #{phone}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_user SET is_delete = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{id}
